title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: Jordan Urbs reviews ZimaBoard 2, a compact self-hosting server, and demonstrates a sovereign AI stack combining OpenClaw (a community fork of leaked Cloud Code), Venice AI, Apify for web scraping, and a Telegram bot interface for a local AI news briefing system. The setup eliminates cloud vendor lock-in and enables local AI assistant deployment on consumer hardware.
